title: ResurrectionChest
description: Let players make a death chest at home!
body:
# 🟠 Why ResurrectionChest? * **Never Lose Your Gear Again!** Set up death chests that automatically collect your items when you die — no more dangerous retrieval runs, or worse, losing items in inaccessible places! * **Simple Setup!** Just place a chest, add a sign with `[deathchest]`, and your gear is safe! * **Custom Models!** This plugin has [**FreeMinecraftModels**](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/freeminecraftmodels/) integration for stunning visual upgrades! * **Premium & Free Model Packs!** Choose from [**beautiful wooden chests (free DLC)**](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/ResurrectionChest/#wooden-chest) or upgrade to [**premium chests**](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/ResurrectionChest/#angelic-chest) for amazing designs! * **Permission-Based Models!** Control which players get access to different chest designs! * **Double Chest Support!** Works with single chests, double chests, and hoppers! * **Plugin Compatibility!** Designed to work seamlessly with protection plugins and other server systems! * **Want an even better experience?** Works great with [EliteMobs](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/elitemobs/), [Free Minecraft Models](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/freeminecraftmodels/), [BetterStructures](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/betterstructures/), and [Resource Pack Manager](https://nightbreak.io/plugin/resourcepackmanager/) — all free! # 🟠 How to Setup ### For Admins: 1. Put the **ResurrectionChest.jar** into your server and **restart your server** 2. You're done! ### For Players: 1. Place down a chest (can even be a double chest) 2. While sneaking, place a sign on the chest (any type of sign) 3. Write: **[deathchest]** 4. That’s it! # 🟠 Additional Downloads

# 🟠 Third Party Plugin Compatibility This plugin was designed to avoid as many plugin conflicts as possible. All it does is add items to a chest if the player has set that chest up properly. It should not conflict with most protection systems, and death chests should get protected by other plugins with no issues. **Note:** You need *FreeMinecraftModels* installed if you want to use ResurrectionChest with custom models. # 🟠 Permissions The main permission is `resurrectionchest.use` (true by default - use negative permissions to disable for groups/players). Chest model permissions: - resurrectionchest.model.free - free model - resurrectionchest.model.premium- angelic model # 🟠 View More by Magmaguy!

# 🟠 Partner servers **Matecraft** is the official BetterStructures server! It’s run by me and is **always up-to-date** with the **latest experimental features and new build packs**. Cozy community, dedicated players — come see the plugins as they were designed to work!

elitesurvival.matecraft.org
